error.cors:
Error: Local Environment Setup Required
To run this application locally on web, please use the following command:
flutter run -d chrome --web-browser-flag "--disable-web-security"
This step is necessary to bypass CORS restrictions during local development. Please note that this flag should only be used in a development environment and never in production.

sign_in_form.welcome_message: Welcome to InvestTrack - your companion in smart investments.
sign_in_form.consent_prompt_data_collection: I consent to the collection of my data.
sign_in_form.error_sign_in_unavailable_web_1: Sign in is not available here. Please use our official website:

demo.banner_message: Demo Mode - Sign in to track your own portfolio.
demo.sign_in_required_body: Create a free account to start tracking your personal investments.

how_it_works.title: How InvestTrack Works
how_it_works.step1_body: Enter the ticker symbol, quantity, and purchase date for each position you hold.
how_it_works.step2_body: We fetch real-time prices and automatically calculate your total gain or loss.
how_it_works.step3_body: Your portfolio is personal - a free account keeps your data private and synced across devices.
